title: Events, Held State, Actions, Remapping, Focus, and Devices
description: The ship fires every frame a key is held, misses quit events, keeps thrust after focus loss, hard-codes WASD, assumes one controller identity, and requires precise simultaneous presses. Learners cumulatively produce device-independent remappable action layer through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Drain or pump the bounded event queue every frame and distinguish ordered events from sampled device state.
Map press, release, repeat, held, analog, and one-shot behavior to named actions with testable transitions.
Store configurable action bindings, detect conflicts, offer alternatives, and avoid unmodified character-key shortcuts where inappropriate.
